Doc ID doc:video-intake-console-issue-1-implementation-run
Title Video Intake Console Issue 1 Implementation Run
Scope Implement GitHub issue #1 in triadflow/video-intake-console: build the local video intake console into a working local app with durable queue, YouTube import, skill action configuration, local Claude Code runner, per-video processing history/artifacts/review workflow, and first living-doc-compositor integration path.
Owner / Team Codex
Generated 2026-04-27T02:37:43.832Z
Version / Revision draft
Location URL Unknown
Team Unknown
Canonical Origin /Users/rene/projects/video-intake-console/docs/living-runs/video-intake-console-issue-1-run.json
Derived From Unknown
Source Coverage Issue #1 and sub-issues hydrated; source commit 96bdafe implements the local app, persistence, skill discovery, runner seam, and API verification probes.

Objective Implement GitHub issue #1 in triadflow/video-intake-console: build the local video intake console into a working local app with durable queue, YouTube import, skill action configuration, local Claude Code runner, per-video processing history/artifacts/review workflow, and first living-doc-compositor integration path.

Success condition Issue #1 epic acceptance criteria are satisfied by committed source changes, verification evidence, pushed branch, opened or updated PR, issue update, and linked run document. If the full epic cannot be completed in this run, objectiveReady=false must be recorded with evidenced blockers, completed implementation evidence, and source-system follow-up state.

Capability Surface2026-04-27T02:27:09.896Z

Local app shell from static mockup

Built
Code index.html README.md
Tickets
#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/2

Commit 96bdafe adds package.json, server.mjs, app.js, and keeps the validated three-pane UX in index.html.

README now documents npm start and the local URL.

Durable video queue and state model

Built
Code index.html
Tickets
#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/3

server.mjs persists queue and jobs in .video-intake-data/state.json.

Verified add video, patch notes/watchState, restart-safe state file, duplicate detection, and per-video history from job completion.

Configured Claude Code skill actions

Built
Code index.html
Tickets
#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/4

server.mjs discovers configured actions from /Users/rene/projects/living-doc-compositor/.claude/skills.

Verified /api/health exposes allowlisted integrate-source, dossier-scan, transcribe, and custom actions with cwd and availability.

Local Claude Code runner with job tracking

Built
Code README.md
Tickets
#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/5

server.mjs runs claude -p - locally, writes prompt to stdin, captures stdout/stderr, records exit code and duration, and stores log artifacts.

Verified a harmless custom prompt job completed successfully through local Claude Code CLI.

YouTube video and playlist import

Partial
Code index.html
Tickets
#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/6

Video URL import is implemented and verified with yt-dlp metadata resolution and duplicate detection.

Playlist import is implemented through yt-dlp --flat-playlist but still needs a dedicated public-playlist verification run.

Per-video processing history, artifacts, and review workflow

Built
Code index.html
Tickets
#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/7

Jobs append durable per-video history entries and run-log artifacts.

Verified a successful custom run moved the video to needs_review with retained stdout and changed-file metadata.

First living-doc-compositor integration path

Partial
Code README.md
Tickets
#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/8

Configured integrate-source and dossier-scan actions target /Users/rene/projects/living-doc-compositor and reuse the existing skill contract.

A real integrate-source run was not executed in this pass to avoid unreviewed downstream doc mutations; this remains the main objective readiness gap.

#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/3#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/4#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/5#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/6#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/8

Path server.mjs

Line 1-619

Revision 96bdafe

What it does Serves the local app, stores queue/job state, imports YouTube metadata via yt-dlp, discovers skill actions, and runs claude -p jobs.

Why it matters (1)

This file owns the local-first backend and Claude Code runner capability for the epic.

Path app.js

Line 1-371

Revision 96bdafe

What it does Loads queue/actions/jobs from the API, renders filters/current video/skill actions/history, and sends mutations back to the server.

Why it matters (1)

This file owns the live behavior of the previously static mockup.

Verification Surface2026-04-27T02:27:09.896Z

Local app startup and UI smoke

Partial Gate
Automation package scripts pending
Tickets
#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/2

Current coverage npm run check passes; npm start served http://127.0.0.1:4177; curl verified index.html and app.js are served.

Next step Run browser-level smoke test if needed before merge.

Current gaps (1)

No Playwright/browser screenshot verification has been added.

Queue persistence and filters

Partial Gate
Tickets
#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/3

Current coverage Video add, metadata resolution, note/watchState patch, duplicate detection, and job history persistence verified through API.

Next step Add automated tests or scripted fixtures for state transitions.

Current gaps (1)

Restart was represented by persisted state and server restart, but there is not yet an automated persistence test.

Local Claude Code runner behavior

Partial Gate
Tickets
#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/5

Current coverage Custom action job invoked claude -p -, completed with exitCode 0, captured stdout, duration, and changed-file status; rg found no Anthropic/OpenAI API usage.

Next step Add negative-path verification for missing CLI, non-zero exit, and timeout.

Current gaps (1)

Failure and timeout paths are implemented but not yet externally verified.

living-doc-compositor end-to-end route

Partial Gate
Tickets
#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/8

Current coverage Actions are configured with cwd /Users/rene/projects/living-doc-compositor and discovered integrate-source skill metadata.

Next step Run a harmless or explicitly approved /integrate-source invocation and record downstream git status.

Current gaps (1)

No real living-doc-compositor skill run has been executed from this app yet.

Decision Record2026-04-27T02:27:09.896Z

Local-first app, not hosted service

Ground Truth
Tickets
#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/1

Issue #1 explicitly requires a local web console and local Claude Code route.

Skill execution goes through local Claude Code CLI

Ground Truth
Tickets
#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/5

The app must invoke claude -p locally. Direct Anthropic/OpenAI API calls are out of scope for satisfying the runner.

Orchestrate existing living-doc-compositor skills

Ground Truth
Tickets
#https://github.com/triadflow/video-intake-console/issues/8

The app is the intake and orchestration layer; it must not copy /integrate-source or /dossier business logic.
